'''Malrev IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Thrasybule sector/Legends|Thrasybule sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its history was strongly associated with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].

==History==
[[File:Battle_of_Malrev_IV.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Rogue Squadron is attacked by Irrukiine.]]

Malrev IV was a focal point for the dark side that served as a vital dark side hub for the Sith. It was the site of several battles during the [[New Sith Wars]]. In [[1750 BBY]], the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] mercenaries [[Battle of Malrev IV|defeated]] the forces of the [[Dark Underlord]] on the planet. Several centuries later, another [[Battle of Malrev IV (1004 BBY)|battle]] took place at the beginning of the [[Light and Darkness War]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

It had a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith Temple (Malrev IV)|Temple]] on it visited by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it was used by [[Cartariun]] to control the indigenous [[Irrukiine]] and [[Malrev incident|attack]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].<ref name="RfaR" />
